title: Ploiești、Prahova — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Ploiești、Prahovaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PloieștiはPrahovaにある人口209,945の都市です。The center of Romania’s oil industry, a historic city with beautiful 19th-century architecture, museums, and a strategic location near the Carpathian Mountains.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
